---
title: "Data Analysis"
format: html
---

## 1. Load Required Library

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
```

## 2. Read the CSV File

```{python}
df = pd.read_csv("data/lightcast_job_postings.csv", low_memory=False)
df.head()
```

## 3. Check Dataset Shape

```{python}
print("Rows and Columns:", df.shape)
```

## 4. View Column Names

```{python}
print(df.columns.tolist())
```

## 5. Basic Summary Statistics

```{python}
df.describe()
```

## 6. Scatter Plot (Salary)

```{python}
df_notnull = df[df['SALARY'].notnull()]
df_notnull.plot.scatter(x='ID', y='SALARY')
plt.show()
```
